title: nephrodium nymphale
intro: Nephrodium nymphale, also known as the maidenhair fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Nephrodium nymphale include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Nephrodium nymphale can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
